problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: Combining Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
